title: Anloga Heat Wave
lead: Anloga is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.14. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Anloga has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) to 10.0 GG, while Heating Degree Days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 74% and wind speed is moderate at 12.2 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, exacerbating the heat wave's impact on the city.
conclusion: Implement immediate mitigation measures to ensure public safety and minimize damage.
